name: gemini-cli-scheduler
description: Task scheduling extension for Gemini CLI
author: Hermann Hahn

scripts.postversion: git push origin main --follow-tags && npm run push:release
scripts.push:release: node -e "const v = require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('gh release create v' + v + ' --generate-notes || echo \"Release already exists\"', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
scripts.push:commit: node -e "const v = require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('git add . && git commit -m \"v' + v + '\" && git push', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
scripts.deploy: npm run lint && npm version patch -m "v%s" --force && npm run cleanup-releases && npm run update
